title: doctrine: risk-scaled semantic judge in the goal-check + close regen (D4)
action: Per D4 (+Δ6 folded in CONTEXT Validating amendments): the judge-tier table lives ONLY in skills/bee-hive/references/routing-and-contracts.md (tiny/small: mechanical only; standard: one checklist judge per capped behavior_change cell — bee-review pinned type, review tier, read-only, checks must_haves truths vs diff + CONTEXT citations + task-to-diff alignment, returns judge-verdict/1 recorded via cells judge-record; high-risk: same judge, independence preferred, equal model recorded same-model honestly; verdict handling: PASS counts; NEEDS_REVISION automatic => cell NOT done, re-dispatch with exact failing checks + ledger entry; authority => escalate). The SEVEN 565e68d0-adjacent surfaces (bee-swarming SKILL.md goal-check step + no-auto-reviewer line, swarming-reference, bee-hive SKILL.md x2 sites, go-mode, AGENTS.md + templates/AGENTS.block.md, bee-scribing SKILL.md) each get ONE scoping clause referencing that table — goal-check judge is verification, NOT independent review; Gate 4, review sessions, candidates untouched — never a duplicated table (hand-kept-list rule). AGENTS.md stays under the 20KiB budget (test_agents_budget). No census stale tokens. Final render_plugin_skill_trees + release_manifest --write; all five verify suites green. Docs/skill-text only — no lib edits.

truths: boundary to user-invoked review stated explicitly
judge dispatch uses the pinned review type, read-only

verify: node scripts/test_skill_render.mjs && node scripts/test_conformance.mjs && node scripts/test_agents_budget.mjs && node scripts/census_stale_spawn_syntax.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_plugin_distribution.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Single-homed the D4 goal-check semantic-judge tier table in skills/bee-hive/references/routing-and-contracts.md and added a one-line 565e68d0 scoping clause to each of the seven doctrine surfaces (bee-swarming SKILL.md + swarming-reference.md, bee-hive SKILL.md x2 sites, go-mode.md, AGENTS.md + its template, bee-scribing SKILL.md) pointing back to it — goal-check judge stays verification, Gate 4/review sessions/candidates ledger untouched. Regenerated plugin skill trees + release manifest; AGENTS.md stays at 17680B, well under the 20KiB budget.
